mapper.sql: select run_id, user_id, user_miner_id, miner_id, reward_mode, run_status, start_time, cycle_end_time, last_calc_time, cycle_wag, produced_wag, credited_flag, collect_time, version, create_time, update_time from sys_user_miner_run
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} and run_status in ('0','1') order by run_id desc limit 1 for update
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_miner_run(user_id, user_miner_id, miner_id, reward_mode, run_status, start_time, cycle_end_time, last_calc_time, cycle_wag, produced_wag, credited_flag, collect_time, version, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{userMinerId}, #{minerId}, #{rewardMode}, #{runStatus}, #{startTime}, #{cycleEndTime}, #{lastCalcTime}, #{cycleWag}, #{producedWag}, #{creditedFlag}, #{collectTime}, #{version}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_user_miner_run set run_status = '2', update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and run_status in ('0','1')
